title: Young Researchers' Perceptions of Expertise 2018
description: The study charted young researchers' experiences on the development of their own academic expertise in the early stages of their research careers. The respondents were asked to describe the opportunities and challenges they had faced and whether they had received help and support for their work and from where. The data include 51 informal writings, of which 16 are written in English and 35 in Finnish. Some respondents had just begun their academic careers while others recalled their early career
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
